last_output: The morning begins with the sound of ringing bells echoing through the hallways. Students rush to their classrooms. Teachers greet everyone with smiles and warm welcomes as lessons begin. Laughter fills the lunchroom. A school day ends with a sense of accomplishment.

School starts early in the morning. I love my favorite subjects. Throughout the day, students engage in various classes, including math, science, and literature. Lunch time is the best part! Friends gather to share stories and laughter during the midday break. Finally, the school day ends, and I head home.
